text.title: Cheap-Guardrail Tripwire Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the main agent using an expensive model (sonnet/opus tier)?

branch.when: main_expensive == true AND cheap_available == true AND calibration_ready == true

conclusion.verdict: Install guardrail. Monitor FP rate against calibration set.

branch.when: main_expensive == true AND cheap_available == true AND calibration_ready == false

conclusion.verdict: Build calibration set first; guardrail without FP monitoring drifts.
Skip — no cheap model means no cost asymmetry.
Skip — main is already cheap; guardrail doesn't save enough.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
